parameters.prompt: One isolated shallow rectangular orbital-station corridor wall panel, exactly 2.4 m wide, 2.6 m high and only 0.32 m deep. Solid flat rear mounting plane; front has two structural posts, replaceable service panels, one recessed utility chase, ventilation grille, equipment locker, handrail, task-light recesses, pressure seals and fasteners. Bas-relief wall slab only, depth less than 14 percent of width, visible face +Z. No doorway, room, floor, ceiling, side chamber, furniture, loose wires, text, logo, stand, ground or background.
parameters.texture_prompt: De-lit civic-industrial station panel: zinc-gray structural alloy, off-white replaceable panels, dark kick plate, brushed steel rail, restrained amber wayfinding accents and plausible hand wear. No baked lighting, pseudo-text, logos, broad dirt, labels or emissive glow.

reasons: generated a nearly square room-scale box instead of a shallow corridor wall slab
minimum-to-maximum dimension ratio is 0.558 rather than at most 0.14
five connected components and full-depth enclosure geometry violate the modular wall contract
art_review.disposition: retain as a negative-control shape study; do not refine or promote
